Bash(powershell -Command "
[System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\('F:\\win7-vcs_20250128_1233\\bin\\VCSPosition.exe'\) | 
  ForEach-Object { [char]$_ } | 
  Out-String -Width 10000 | 
  Select-String -Pattern '\(?i\)sidetone|side.tone|SideTone' -AllMatches | 
  ForEach-Object { \\$_.Matches } | 
  Select-Object -ExpandProperty Value | Sort-Object -Unique
")

Bash(powershell -Command "
\\$bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\('F:\\win7-vcs_20250128_1233\\bin\\VCSPosition.exe'\)
\\$text = [System.Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetString\(\\$bytes\)
\\$marker = 'Sucessfully obtained sidetone'
\\$idx = \\$text.IndexOf\(\\$marker\)
Write-Host \\"Index: \\$idx\\"
if \(\\$idx -ge 0\) {
    \\$start = [Math]::Max\(0, \\$idx - 500\)
    \\$end = [Math]::Min\(\\$text.Length, \\$idx + \\$marker.Length + 500\)
    \\$ctx = \\$text.Substring\(\\$start, \\$end - \\$start\)
    \\$clean = [regex]::Replace\(\\$ctx, '[^\\x20-\\x7E]', '.'\)
    Write-Host \\$clean
}
")

Bash(powershell -Command "
\\$bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\('F:\\win7-vcs_20250128_1233\\bin\\VCSPosition.exe'\)
\\$text = [System.Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetString\(\\$bytes\)
\\$marker = 'Setting sidetone level to'
\\$idx = \\$text.IndexOf\(\\$marker\)
Write-Host \\"Index: \\$idx\\"
if \(\\$idx -ge 0\) {
    \\$start = [Math]::Max\(0, \\$idx - 200\)
    \\$end = [Math]::Min\(\\$text.Length, \\$idx + \\$marker.Length + 600\)
    \\$ctx = \\$text.Substring\(\\$start, \\$end - \\$start\)
    \\$clean = [regex]::Replace\(\\$ctx, '[^\\x20-\\x7E]', '.'\)
    Write-Host \\$clean
}
")

Bash(powershell -Command "
\\$bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\('F:\\win7-vcs_20250128_1233\\bin\\VCSPosition.exe'\)
\\$text = [System.Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetString\(\\$bytes\)
foreach \(\\$marker in @\('backlit','contrast','Backlit','Contrast','BACKLIT','CONTRAST'\)\) {
    \\$idx = \\$text.IndexOf\(\\$marker\)
    if \(\\$idx -ge 0\) {
        \\$start = [Math]::Max\(0,\\$idx-300\)
        \\$end   = [Math]::Min\(\\$text.Length,\\$idx+300\)
        \\$clean = [regex]::Replace\(\\$text.Substring\(\\$start,\\$end-\\$start\),'[^\\x20-\\x7E]','.'\)
        Write-Host '=== ' \\$marker ' at ' \\$idx ' ==='
        Write-Host \\$clean
    }
}
")

Bash(powershell -File - <<'EOF'
$bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("F:\\win7-vcs_20250128_1233\\bin\\AudioBoxTest.exe"\)
$text = [System.Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetString\($bytes\)
$clean = [regex]::Replace\($text,'[^\\x20-\\x7E\\r\\n]','.'\)
$matches2 = [regex]::Matches\($clean,'[A-Za-z0-9_.:\\- /=,\\\(\\\)\\[\\]%]{6,}'\)
$results = $matches2 | ForEach-Object { $_.Value } | Sort-Object -Unique | Where-Object { $_.Length -lt 80 }
$results | Select-Object -First 120
EOF)

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "
\\$path = 'HKLM:\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\MMDevices\\Audio\\Capture\\{fc684f44-ce15-4fe7-be7f-498a9ec59255}\\Properties'
\\$raw = \(Get-ItemProperty \\$path -Name '{b3f8fa53-0004-438e-9003-51a46e139bfc},2'\).'{ b3f8fa53-0004-438e-9003-51a46e139bfc},2'
if \(-not \\$raw\) { \\$raw = \(Get-ItemProperty \\$path\).'{ b3f8fa53-0004-438e-9003-51a46e139bfc},2' }
\\$vals = Get-ItemProperty \\$path
\\$val2 = \\$vals.PSObject.Properties | Where-Object { \\$_.Name -like '*b3f8fa53*,2' }
Write-Host 'Name:' \\$val2.Name
Write-Host 'Value:' \\$val2.Value
\\$bytes = [byte[]]\\$val2.Value
Write-Host 'First 12 bytes \(hex\):' \(\\$bytes[0..11] | ForEach-Object { \\$_.ToString\('X2'\) }\) -join ' '
" 2>&1)
